title: Delissea dentata

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Delissea dentata include flavonoids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
